task_updates.executor_notes: Added two regression tests for the video editor shell path in `LayoutMainContent.test.tsx`: one asserts `paddingBottom: '180px'` when `isVideoEditorShellActive` and `isGenerationsPaneLocked` are true, and one asserts `paddingBottom: '0px'` when the generations pane is neither locked nor open. Verified by inspection that both tests reuse `defaultPanesState`, set `useVideoEditorRouteStateMock.mockReturnValue({ isEditorRoute: true, isVideoEditorShellActive: true })`, and read styles from `container.querySelector('.content-container')`.
